entity.summary: Centralized crypto trading platform offering order-book trading, instant exchange, fiat exchange functionality, and related digital-asset services.
entity.notes: The official site is live in 2026 and presents Cryptonex trading and exchange services. The launch date uses a year-level approximation based on the official site's 2017-2026 operating/copyright range. A single national origin is not asserted; the record uses Global as an origin bucket.

evidence.title: Cryptonex official platform website
evidence.notes: First-party site remains live and presents order-book trading, instant exchange, fiat exchange, current platform activity, and Cryptonex LP branding.

evidence.title: Cryptonex exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Discovery registry source identifies exchange id `cryptonex`; retained as secondary registry corroboration rather than current-status authority.
